changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for resource specificity
review_notes: The functions are generally well-named and map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. However, the function 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' should specify the resource as 'apiserver' to align with the naming pattern and clarify that it pertains to the API server's audit logging feature.
naming_improvements: Use 'apiserver' instead of 'audit' for the resource name in 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' to specify the audit logging feature of the API server.
title: Audit Record Generation - Generate audit records for the...
step1_reasoning: The NIST 800-53 AU-12-c control focuses on generating audit records, which directly maps to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logging features that can be configured to capture detailed audit records of API server activities. This includes enabling audit logging, configuring audit policies to capture specific metadata, and ensuring that logs are retained according to policy requirements.
